prompt: Create the scenes file for a Blog section. Provider is `my_drupal_theme`. The data model has node.article (composition: structured) with fields: title (string), field_body (text), field_image (reference to media.image). I need two scenes: one Blog Detail page showing a single article in full view mode, and one Blog Listing page showing multiple articles. Output as YAML to sections/blog/blog.section.scenes.yml

assertions.description: The Listing scene uses 'entity: view.*' not 'records: []'
No 'records:' key appears in a listing scene context
Both scenes use 'type: scene' and 'ref: design-system:shell'
No 'type: element' nodes appear in the output
